# Kasper Simonsen — Independent Software Engineer

> Custom software built by a single engineer for businesses when off-the-shelf tools don't fit.

Kasper Simonsen is an independent software engineer based in Melbourne, Australia. He builds custom web applications, mobile apps, and AI-powered systems for small to mid-size businesses. Specialises in Shopify integrations, industrial automation software, and multi-tenant SaaS platforms.

## Services

- **Tools & Dashboards** (Fixed Scope, 1–3 weeks): Internal tools, workflow apps, custom reporting, client portals, small Shopify add-ons, system integrations.
- **Platforms & Systems** (Per Project, 6–16 weeks): Full-stack platform builds — multi-tenant SaaS, AI agent pipelines, industrial software, Shopify backends with complex operational requirements.

## Notable Work

- **Forja**: Eight-agent AI pipeline for Siemens TIA Portal — turns functional specs into compiling SCL/HMI code and back. Stack: React 19, Claude API, .NET 4.8, Supabase, TIA Openness.
- **Assemblio**: Shopify-connected BOM, inventory, purchasing, stocktake, and capacity system for assembly teams. Multi-tenant SaaS with append-only ledger and RLS from schema up.
- **Silio**: Industrial feed production software for Rabar's plant — Omron PLC integration, NFC-signed weighing, React Native Android scanner, SQL audit log. Replaced paper-based workflow.

## Availability

Taking on new projects. Based in Melbourne, Australia (AEST / UTC+10).

## Contact

https://kaspersimonsen.dev/contact
